name: Google Maps Directions
description: Get a route between two locations on Google Maps and extract distance/duration plus the step-by-step instructions, with a viewport screenshot.

browser_automation.description: Hits google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&origin=...&destination=...&travelmode=... and reads the directions panel.

sequences.name: google_maps_directions_extract
sequences.description: Open a Maps route, extract distance + duration + ordered steps, and capture a screenshot.

required_variables.name: origin
required_variables.description: Starting location. Free text (address, place name, lat,lng).

required_variables.name: destination
required_variables.description: Ending location. Free text (address, place name, lat,lng).

optional_variables.name: mode
optional_variables.description: Travel mode: driving (default), walking, bicycling, transit

help.summary: Get a Google Maps route summary + step-by-step directions between two places, plus a screenshot.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: Starting location: address, place name, or 'lat,lng'.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Ending location: address, place name, or 'lat,lng'.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Travel mode. Defaults to driving when omitted.

examples.command: rzn-browser run google maps-directions --param origin="Times Square, New York" --param destination="Central Park, New York"
rzn-browser run google maps-directions --param origin="SFO" --param destination="Salesforce Tower, San Francisco" --param mode=transit

help.returns: Two arrays: a single-row 'summary' { distance, duration, summary } and 'steps' (up to 30) of { step_index, instruction, distance }. Screenshot under test-results/workflow-artifacts/google-maps-directions/.
notes: If 'mode' is omitted, the placeholder {mode} ends up in the URL as the literal string '{mode}', which Maps treats as no mode → defaults to driving. That's intentional.
Steps panel only opens after clicking the route card; if click fails, the steps array will be empty but summary will still be populated.
